summary: Iteration 13 - Dashboard Rebuild Testing. Tested the completely new dynamic dashboard with Recharts charts, KPIs, CRM pipeline, conversations, agents, and navigation. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed - dashboard loads correctly with all sections.

issues: Console warning: Recharts shows dimension warnings during page load/transitions - 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. This is a minor cosmetic issue that doesn't affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Recharts ResponsiveContainer may need explicit minHeight/minWidth to prevent console warnings during render
seed_data_creation: None - used existing real Supabase data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 verified the new dynamic dashboard. All features working: (1) Dashboard greeting shows user name, (2) Credit counter '188/200' clickable->pricing, (3) 4 KPI cards (Messages Today:15, Resolution Rate:0%, Active Leads:5/6, Revenue:$7500), (4) Messages area chart shows 7 days with proper labels (Fri-Thu), (5) CRM Pipeline shows colored bars (New:2, Qualified:2, Proposal:1, Won:1), (6) Recent Conversations shows 5 items with channel icons, status badges, time ago, (7) Agent Performance shows 'Test Agent Updated' with 0 chats/0 resolved, (8) Quick Actions 3 buttons work: Create Agent->agents, View Inbox->chat, View CRM->crm, (9) Plan & Usage shows Free plan, Messages 12/200, Agents 1/1, Upgrade button, (10) Bottom nav 6 tabs all work. Test-ids verified: dashboard-greeting, credit-counter, profile-menu-btn, profile-dropdown, profile-edit-btn, profile-billing-btn, profile-logout-btn, stat-0 to stat-3, quick-action-0 to quick-action-2, bottom-nav, nav-dashboard, nav-chat, nav-agents, nav-crm, nav-analytics, nav-settings.

fields_verified: messages_by_day (7 days with date, label, count)

dashboard_sections.kpi_cards: 4 cards: Messages Today, Resolution Rate, Active Leads, Revenue
dashboard_sections.messages_chart: Recharts AreaChart showing last 7 days with proper tooltips
dashboard_sections.crm_pipeline: Colored bars for New, Qualified, Proposal, Won stages
dashboard_sections.recent_conversations: 5 recent items with channel icon, name, status badge, time ago
dashboard_sections.agent_performance: Agent list with chat count and resolved count
dashboard_sections.quick_actions: 3 buttons: Create Agent, View Inbox, View CRM
dashboard_sections.plan_usage: Free plan, messages bar 12/200, agents bar 1/1, Upgrade button
dashboard_sections.bottom_nav: 6 tabs: Home, Chat, Agents, CRM, Analytics, Settings
